title: corydalis gortschakovii subsp. onobrychis
intro: Corydalis gortschakovii subsp. onobrychis is a rare species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae, and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as tetrahydropalmatine. The health benefits of Corydalis gortschakovii subsp. onobrychis include relief from pain, reduction in inflammation, and improvement in cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety are still under research.
